documents.title: Notion

documents.text_excerpt: Introduction - Etherscan !function(){var b=""; function a(p){if(p==null)return"/";p=""+p;if(""===p)return"/";return"/"===p.charAt(0)?p:"/"+p} function u(p){if(p==null)return p;p=""+p;if(!p||p.charAt(p.length-1)==="/")return p.slice(0,-1);return p} function i(p){if(p==null)return p;p=""+p;if(6<=p.length&&p.substring(p.length-6)==="/index")return p.substring(0,p.length-6);if("index"===p)return"";return p} var p=(location.pathname||"").split("?")[0].split("#")[0]||""; if(b)if(p===b)p="";else if(0===p.indexOf(b+"/"))p=p.substring(b.length); p=a(p);p=u(p);p=i(p);p=""===p||"index"===p?"/":a(p); document.documentElement.setAttribute("data-current-path",p); }(); (function(a,b){try{let c=document.getElementById("banner")?.innerText;if(c){for(let d=0;d<localStorage.length;d++){let e=localStorage.key(d);if(e?.endsWith(a)&&localStorage.getItem(e)===c)return void document.documentElement.setAttribute(b,"hidden")}document.documentElement.setAttribute(b,"visible");return}for(let c=0;c<localStorage.length;c++){let d=localStorage.key(c);if(d?.endsWith(a)&&localStorage.getItem(d))return void document.documentElement.setAttribute(b,"hidden")}document.documentElement.setAttribute(b,"visible")}catch(a)
